statement: A weightless cantilever beam is fixed at A (x=0), free at B (x=4 m). A linearly varying distributed load acts downward: intensity is 800 N/m at A (x=0) decreasing linearly to 0 at B (x=4 m). Find the reactions at A.
common_student_errors: Placing the resultant at 2/3 of the length from A (the high end) instead of 1/3 from A
Using the average intensity (400 N/m) × length as the resultant instead of the triangle area formula (0.5 × base × height)
Neglecting the moment reaction at the fixed wall
